artCandidates.note: Generated at 1419x1108 and aligned to the 1391x1086 master; window and tile geometry still need pixel audit.
Raw flat-green candidates; not compiled until chroma, scale and origin audits pass.
Wave 2 draft sources compiled with attachment ownership; origin and deletion audits remain.
Draft candidates generated from the room master; chroma background varies slightly and uses a wider compiler threshold.
Rejected: generated a freestanding range with cooktop instead of the reference room's under-counter oven.
Second oven attempt removes the cooktop; shelf, rail and bin are isolated from the room master for draft assembly.
Counter decor is split by physical parent so hiding either base cabinet cannot leave props floating.
Four zone-specific floor rugs use independent body layers and never claim path occupancy.

prompts.desk-floor-plant-chroma-v1.png: Compact leafy floor plant with upright oval leaves in a warm terracotta pot; match the reference room's low-density pixel art, warm palette, scale and isometric view; isolated single object on a flat #ff00ff background.
prompts.living-large-plant-chroma-v1.png: Taller, fuller broad-leaf floor plant in a dark charcoal-blue ceramic pot; match the reference room's low-density pixel art, warm palette, scale and isometric view; isolated single object on a flat #ff00ff background.

artCandidates.note: Standalone floor-plant candidates. Bookcase content was trimmed so neither plant remains owned by the cluster.

generation.prompt: Remove only localized lamp illumination patches and hotspots; preserve exact shell geometry, materials, window, ambient tone, pixel density and isometric perspective.

artCandidates.note: Neutral-light shell candidate removes baked lamp-specific glows so light layers can disappear with their owning objects; aligned copy matches the 1391x1086 visual master.

prompts.desk-lamp-chroma-v1.png: Compact warm-brass articulated desk lamp with downward conical shade and round base; isolated low-density isometric pixel art.
prompts.bedside-lamp-chroma-v1.png: Small warm-brass bedside lamp with compact cream pleated bell shade and round base; isolated low-density isometric pixel art.
prompts.foreground-table-lamp-chroma-v1.png: Short dark-brass console lamp with warm cream scalloped fabric shade and round base; isolated low-density isometric pixel art.
prompts.warm-lamp-halo-blue-v3.png: Soft warm amber circular light halo with dithered radial falloff and no fixture or surface, isolated on flat #0000ff for alpha extraction.

artCandidates.note: Desk, bedside and foreground lamps own body plus extracted-alpha light layers; the latter two attach to independently generated carrier furniture.

prompts.bedside-table-chroma-v1.png: Narrow tall warm-wood bedside cabinet with top, drawer and two open shelves; furniture body only, no lamp or decor.
prompts.foreground-console-chroma-v1.png: Long low warm-wood foreground console with cabinet doors and drawers; furniture body only, no plants, lamp or decor.

artCandidates.note: Carrier furniture is isolated before attaching its lamp and later decor children, preventing floating props and duplicate ownership.

prompts.bedside-decor-cluster-chroma-v1.png: Tiny green bedside alarm clock plus one neutral trinket; decor only, no lamp or cabinet.
prompts.foreground-console-plants-chroma-v1.png: Three varied tabletop houseplants in terracotta, cream and muted-green pots; plants only, no lamp or console.

artCandidates.note: Each decor group attaches to its direct carrier and contains no carrier or lamp pixels.

prompts.window-curtains-chroma-v1.png: Paired teal gathered window curtains with tiebacks, dark wooden rod, finials and rings; curtains only, excluding window, frame, wall and plants.
prompts.window-planter-left-chroma-v1.png: Compact leafy green terracotta potted plant from the window sill; plant only, excluding sill and window.
prompts.window-planter-right-chroma-v1.png: Low rectangular wooden flower box with compact foliage and tiny warm flowers; planter only, excluding sill and window.
prompts.window-hanging-plant-chroma-v1.png: Leafy hanging basket with cords and a small vertical-wall hook; explicitly wall-mounted, never ceiling-mounted.
prompts.window-string-lights-chroma-v1.png: Irregular vertical loop of warm bulbs, wire and wall pins with only tight local halos; explicitly wall-mounted, never ceiling-mounted.

artCandidates.note: Window soft decor is split into five replaceable wall/sill assets. Window frame, glass/view and all ceiling/roof-mounted content are excluded from these candidates.

prompts.clean-shell-windowless-ai-v1.png: Remove only the right-wall window assembly and reconstruct seamless warm plaster; preserve all room geometry and all pixels outside the edit region.
prompts.window-view-chroma-magenta-v1.png: Evening city view panel with purple-pink sky, dark buildings, lit windows and treetops; view only on flat #ff00ff.
prompts.window-view-chroma-v2.png: Same isolated evening city view regenerated on flat #00ff00 because the pink sky conflicted with magenta keying.
prompts.window-frame-chroma-v1.png: Warm dark-wood outer window frame, central mullion, bevels, latch and projecting sill; frame only on flat #ff00ff.

artCandidates.note: The full AI shell edit changed 9.5% of pixels outside the intended window region and was rejected as a direct replacement. The accepted composite uses only its local wall patch over the prior shell. The first magenta window view was also rejected because its sunset sky conflicted with the key color.

prompts.wall-art-window-upper-chroma-v1.png: Small upper blue-gray botanical framed print from the wall left of the window; framed artwork only.
prompts.wall-art-window-lower-chroma-v1.png: Lower warm wood framed rust-orange and teal botanical landscape print; framed artwork only.
prompts.wall-art-bedside-chroma-v1.png: Small muted teal framed botanical picture from the far right bedside wall; framed artwork only.

artCandidates.note: Three wall pictures remain independent wall objects and contain no wall, furniture, lighting, ceiling or roof pixels.

prompts.desk-laptop-chroma-v1.png: Open slim charcoal-blue laptop with a subtle cool interface glow; laptop only.
prompts.desk-stationery-cluster-chroma-v1.png: Muted teal pencil cup, pens, warm note and one compact desk accessory; stationery only.
prompts.desk-book-cluster-chroma-v1.png: Compact stack of warm muted books and one closed notebook; desk books only.
prompts.desk-wall-shelf-chroma-v1.png: Long slim warm-dark-wood floating left-wall shelf with empty surface and subtle brackets; shelf only.
prompts.desk-wall-books-chroma-v1.png: Upright and leaning muted books for the left-wall shelf; books only.
prompts.desk-wall-plants-chroma-v1.png: Terracotta shelf plant with a small trailing vine; shelf-mounted, never ceiling-mounted.
prompts.desk-wall-photo-cluster-chroma-v1.png: Small pinned photo/postcard cluster for the left wall; paper/photos only.

artCandidates.note: Desk surface objects attach directly to desk. Shelf books and plants attach to their wall shelf; the photo cluster remains independent on the wall. No asset contains a carrier, wall, ceiling or roof pixel.

Dining plant attaches only to its side table; the floor lamp is explicitly floor-standing and never ceiling- or roof-mounted. The generated foreground ottoman was rejected because it replaces the reference's distinct teal stool with the wrong geometry.
A sofa generated from a tight reference crop still changes the source silhouette enough that it cannot replace the calibrated v1 layer. Retained only as rejected provenance; it is not in runtime.

Tight reference-crop candidate contributes only an alpha ownership mask. Runtime RGB is cropped from the room master, preserving its original angle and material; the assembled layer must pass position/angle browser review before approval.
